name: KFC Almost Fried Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a paste out of the marinade ingredients (Italian salad dressing mix, flour, salt, lemon juice).
2. Coat chicken evenly with the paste and place in a bowl.
3. Refrigerate overnight or for several hours.
4. Mix pancake mix, paprika, sage, and pepper in a separate bowl.
5. Dip each piece of chicken in milk, then coat with the pancake mixture.
6. Dust off excess coating.
7. Heat 1/2 inch vegetable oil in a skillet over medium heat.
8. Brown chicken for 4 minutes on each side.
9. Remove from skillet and place in a single layer on a shallow baking pan.
10. Seal chicken with additional flour.
11. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
12. Uncover the dish, baste with milk, and return to the oven.
13. Cook uncovered at 400°F for an additional 10 minutes.
